sentences.text: Thank you for calling ran partners our regular business hours are Monday through Friday nine AM to five PM eastern time. If you know, the extension of the person you are trying to reach you may dial that extension at any time during this message for a dial by name directory, please press two for our office location information. Please dial the first few letters of the first or last name of the person you are trying to reach press pound when done press Star to return to the main menu. We could not find any matching names. Please? Try again, please dial the first few letters of the first or last name of the person you are trying to reach press pound when done press Star to return to the main. Mary Beth press one Debbie mask press two all names were. Hi, this is Mary Beth with Ram Partners. Please leave me a message and I will get back to you as soon as I can thank you and.

Hi, Mary Beth this is Freda calling from rentable. I was just calling because we had a call scheduled today at eleven o'clock eastern and and you're not on just wanted to see if it was still a good time. I'll wait on here for a few more minutes and then if not I guess we can reschedule via email thanks.
